summary: Iteration 11 — Google Form survey wiring verified end-to-end. All 10 backend assertions + 5 frontend flows + regression sweep passed. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases green (intro-to-ai, L10b-html, python-fundamentals, income/1, income/2, income/17 all expose correct survey_form_url; income/18 + translator/haitian_creole correctly null; /api/forms returns count=39 with exactly 28 wired (kind=learning + kind=income), translator + programme kinds all null; /api/go?url=forms.gle 302 → forms.gle). Frontend: /forms page header 'Survey forms registry' renders, search 'introduction' filters to Intro to AI card showing 'LINKED ✓' pill and tap on 'Open the Google Form' opens a new tab that flows through /api/go and lands on docs.google.com Google Form. /income/1 bottom shows green 'Share your feedback (Google Form)' card with clipboard icon; tap opens Google Form popup. /income/18 has NO survey card. /translator/haitian_creole has NO survey card. /modules/L10b-html shows BOTH the green survey card AND the terracotta 'Reading List & Free Courses' card. Regression: /welcome renders mountains illustration + sign-in CTA, /resources shows Reading List + Courses, /api/income/modules count=17, /api/programme 200, /api/translator returns 8 modules.
critical_code_review_comments: survey_forms.json mapping is clean and easy to extend — adding a new form is one JSON line.
_survey_form_url() lookup is centralised in server.py and reused for learning, income, and translator endpoints, which keeps the wiring DRY.
/api/go host allowlist already includes forms.gle, so cross-origin-isolation bypass works without extra config.
seed_data_creation: None. Tests are read-only against existing seeded curriculum.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 wired 28 Google Form URLs in /app/backend/curriculum_data/survey_forms.json. Backend exposes survey_form_url on /api/modules/{id}, /api/income/modules/{id}, /api/translator/{key} (currently null for all translator/programme kinds). /api/forms aggregator returns count=39, 28 wired. Frontend shows green 'Share your feedback (Google Form)' card on module + income detail screens when URL present; the /forms registry page shows 'LINKED ✓' vs 'Awaiting URL' pills. External URL navigation routes through /api/go?url=... to bypass cross-origin-isolation. All passing — safe baseline for further survey wiring.
